# YouTube Audio Extractor

> A free, open-source Python tool to extract audio from YouTube videos and playlists.

## Overview

YouTube Audio Extractor provides both a Flask web interface and a command-line tool for extracting audio from YouTube content. Features include bitrate control, automatic chapter-based splitting, playlist support, and cross-platform compatibility.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/cocodedk/youtube-audio-extractor
- Website (EN): https://cocodedk.github.io/youtube-audio-extractor/
- Website (FA): https://cocodedk.github.io/youtube-audio-extractor/fa/
- Download: https://github.com/cocodedk/youtube-audio-extractor/releases/latest/download/youtube-audio-extractor.zip
- Author: https://cocode.dk
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/babakbandpey

## Technical Details

- Language: Python 3.12
- Framework: Flask 3.0 (web), Click 8 (CLI)
- Core dependency: yt-dlp
- License: Apache-2.0

## Key Files

- `youtube_audio_extractor/` — Core extraction logic
- `api/` — Flask REST API endpoints
- `web/` — Static web UI assets
- `web_app.py` — Flask application entry point
- `requirements.txt` — Python dependencies
- `CLAUDE.md` — AI session instructions
